message:
fix: overview mode perf, expose timed_out, add agent_id suppression test

- Store act_start timestamp in delegations array to eliminate O(n) filtered.find() per delegation in overview mode
- Expose timed_out field in overview agents array (was collected in actEnds but not returned)
- Add test: overview mode not triggered when agent_id filter is set
- Add timed_out assertions to existing overview tests
